text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on the school roof trying hard to come up with
a good training schedule for
<chrname>, when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I came up here to read my makeup magazine,
but I didn't realize someone was already here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh, you don't seem so happy, though. Wanna talk
about it?
choice_data_list:
I'm just trying to come up with a training
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. But fussin' about it all by yourself is a
sure way to send you into a tailspin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, a brief escape can be exactly what
you need.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just do something completely unrelated to get
your mind off it. Eat some delicious food or
whatever as a mood palate cleanser.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm doing right now! I'm taking a
break from studying for this test that's coming up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It helps you get back into things with a clear
head. You know, like a mental escape. I think
that's super important, don't you?
choice_data_list:
Thanks for the tip, but I think I'll keep trying a
bit longer.
All right! I'll give this mental escape thing a try!
All right! I'll give this mental escape thing a try!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It helps you get back into things with a clear
head. You know, like a mental escape. I think
that's super important, don't you?
choice_data_list:
Thanks for the tip, but I think I'll keep trying a
bit longer.
All right! I'll give this mental escape thing a try!
All right! I'll give this mental escape thing a try!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ooh, so cool! You're quite the hard worker!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just make sure you don't overdo it. Take a break
when you need it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And if you're really down and out, give me a
shout. I always have an open ear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result of my strong perseverance, I manage
to draft up a satisfactory schedule.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, do it! I'll even join you! No matter how far
we go, I know you'll get back on track right away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
How about we go to the cafeteria and eat
something sweet? There must be some dessert
you've been dying to try there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And as a reward for all your hard work, I'll treat
you to it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to playing a bit of hooky—or as Mejiro
Palmer puts it, "mentally escaping"—I manage to
draft up a satisfactory schedule.
